parameters.query:
SELECT p."IdPac", p."Nombre", p."Apellidos",
  COALESCE(NULLIF(p."TelMovil",''), p."Tel1") AS telefono
FROM "Pacientes" p
WHERE p."IdPac" IN (
  SELECT DISTINCT c."IdPac" FROM "DCitas" c
  WHERE c."Texto" ILIKE '%ortodoncia%' AND c."IdSitC" = 5
    AND c."Fecha" BETWEEN {{ $json.fecha }} - {{ $json.rango }} AND {{ $json.fecha }} + {{ $json.rango }}
)
AND p."IdPac" NOT IN (
  SELECT DISTINCT c2."IdPac" FROM "DCitas" c2
  WHERE c2."Fecha" > {{ $json.fecha }} AND c2."IdSitC" NOT IN (3)
)
AND COALESCE(NULLIF(p."TelMovil",''), p."Tel1") IS NOT NULL
AND (p."AceptaWhatsApp" = true OR p."AceptaWhatsApp" IS NULL)
LIMIT 50
